codegraph_references.summary: Explored restored `ui/selectable-list-row.tsx`, `app-shell/app-shell-tab.tsx`, `ui/thread-resource-card.tsx`, and `app-shell/right-panel.tsx`. Absorb compact row density, token-driven hover/selected states, underline-like tab density, resource card spacing, and right panel width/animation/collapse strategy. Do not absorb Codex DnD/closable tab store runtime, plugin product semantics, signal runtime, VSCode/private host bridges, or business semantics.

Explored current `AppShell`, `LeftPanel`, `ThreadWorkspace`, `RightPanel`, `PanelTabs`, `ResizablePanel`, `TaskThreadComposer`, `ThreadNavigationRail`, right inspector, site skill page, settings page, and token foundation before editing.

out_of_scope: Codex private runtime or business semantics

notes: Subagent not used: GH-171 writes one shared renderer fidelity surface and one shared Loom carrier; parallel writers would increase conflict risk.
User confirmed the early-architecture caveat: current function and data structures do not represent final implementation, and later feature integration still needs UI design, review, and walkthrough.
This evidence intentionally avoids claiming pixel-perfect Codex parity.
